title: CircuitSage Faults v1
subtitle: Synthetic circuit-fault Q&A dataset for fine-tuning Gemma
description: 6,000 instruction-tuned chat examples covering 13 low-voltage analog/digital circuit topologies (op-amp inverting/non-inverting, RC low-pass, voltage divider, BJT common-emitter, full-wave rectifier, active high-pass, integrator, differentiator, Schmitt trigger, 555 astable, NMOS low-side switch, instrumentation amplifier) plus a safety-refusal branch. Built for the CircuitSage Gemma 4 Good Hackathon submission. Each example is `{messages:[system,user,assistant]}` with the assistant emitting structured-diagnosis JSON. 4,978 unique user prompts; max duplicate = 4. See https://github.com/<user>/circuitsage for code and trained adapter.
